description: Path traversal vulnerability allows reading files outside allowed directories
fix: Upgrade to @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem >=0.6.3

description: Symlink following allows escaping allowed directories to read or write arbitrary files
fix: Upgrade to @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem >=0.6.3

description: Project configuration file allows remote code execution via malicious MCP server definitions
fix: Upgrade Claude Code to >=1.0.17

description: Additional RCE vector through project file manipulation in Claude Code
fix: Upgrade Claude Code to >=1.0.17

description: Command injection via MCP tool configuration allows arbitrary command execution
fix: Validate and sanitize all MCP tool command arguments

description: Path traversal vulnerability in Git MCP server allows access to files outside repository
fix: Upgrade to @modelcontextprotocol/server-git >=0.7.0

description: Argument injection in Git MCP server allows execution of arbitrary git commands
fix: Upgrade to @modelcontextprotocol/server-git >=0.7.0

description: Command injection vulnerability in mcp-package-docs allows arbitrary command execution
fix: Remove mcp-package-docs or use a patched fork

description: JSON parsing bypass in Go MCP SDK allows malformed requests to bypass validation
fix: Upgrade to @modelcontextprotocol/sdk >=1.2.0

description: Unsanitized eval() call in gemini-mcp-tool allows remote code execution via crafted tool responses
fix: Remove gemini-mcp-tool or replace eval() usage with safe JSON parsing

description: Command injection in mcp-watch security scanner via unsanitized server names in scan arguments
fix: Remove mcp-watch or upgrade to a patched version when available

description: Prompt injection to full system compromise via unrestricted Shell tool access in ms-agent
fix: Remove ms-agent or disable Shell tool access entirely

description: SQL injection via unsanitized query parameters allows arbitrary database operations including data exfiltration
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-postgres >=0.5.0 and enable parameterized queries

description: Arbitrary JavaScript execution via navigate tool allows full browser context takeover and credential theft
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-puppeteer >=0.4.0 and restrict allowed domains

description: SSRF via crafted search queries allows probing internal network resources through the Brave Search API proxy
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-brave-search >=0.3.1

description: Insufficient scope validation allows posting messages to unauthorized channels and reading private channel history
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-slack >=0.6.0 and restrict OAuth scopes

description: Personal access token leakage via verbose error messages exposes GitHub credentials to tool callers
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-github >=0.7.0

description: Container escape via privileged mode and host mount allowing full host filesystem access from MCP tool calls
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-docker >=0.3.0 and disable privileged mode

description: SQL injection via ATTACH DATABASE command allows reading arbitrary SQLite databases on the filesystem
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-sqlite >=0.5.2

description: Server-side request forgery allows fetching internal network resources and cloud metadata endpoints
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-fetch >=0.4.0 and configure URL allowlist

description: Knowledge graph data exfiltration via cross-session memory access allows reading other users' stored entities
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-memory >=0.3.0 and enable session isolation

description: Prompt injection via thought chain manipulation allows overriding system instructions through crafted thinking steps
fix: Upgrade to mcp-server-sequential-thinking >=0.2.0
